name: Catche Eve L2
name_jp: キャシー・イヴ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｌ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>２
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Level 3 or higher monster you control; reduce its Level by exactly 2, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Catche Eve L2" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Level 3 or higher monster you control; reduce its Level by exactly 2, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Catche Eve L2" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Level 3 or higher monster you control; reduce its Level by exactly 2, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Catche Eve L2" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
